creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
On Sat, Apr 21, 2001 at 09:49:37AM -0700, sucho2@vt.edu wrote:

> FreeBSD 198.82.247.66 4.3-RC4 FreeBSD 4.3-RC4 #0: Fri Apr 20 16:14:32 EDT 3001
> sncho@198.82.247.66:/usr/src/sys/compile/MYKERNEL   i386
> >Description:
> I am using XFree86 4.0.3 from FreeBSD packages in my machine.
> The program gnucash package in CD doesn't run on FreeBSD 4.3-RC4.
> May need to recompile from source.
> >How-To-Repeat:
> run gnucash in Gnome Desktop

Please provide more information (e.g. error messages) if you want this
to be looked at.  Thanks.

Kris
